'''Lamus''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]]<ref name="Wellspring">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20031218wellspring|text=The Wellspring|int=The Wellspring (roleplaying adventure)}}</ref> of an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. It was inhabited by the [[A'Mar]] people. Its equator was forested; its poles were [[Desert/Legends|deserts]] with sinkholes. [[Gundark/Legends|Gundarks]] inhabited the moon. One of the moon's settlements was the [[City/Legends|town]] of [[Vidge-Ribu]], a low-tech agrarian community.

{{Moon-stub}}
